## Getter() function

Generates a computed property which returns the selected getter value.

The decorated property needs to be public for type inference to work.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export declare function Getter<Module extends XModuleName, GetterName extends keyof ExtractGetters<Module>>(module: Module, getter: GetterName): DecoratorFor<ExtractGetters<Module>[GetterName]>;
```

## Parameters

|  Parameter | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  module | Module | The [XModuleName](./x-components.xmodulename.md) of the getter. |
|  getter | GetterName | The getter name. |

<b>Returns:</b>

[DecoratorFor](./x-components.decoratorfor.md)<!-- -->&lt;[ExtractGetters](./x-components.extractgetters.md)<!-- -->&lt;Module&gt;\[GetterName\]&gt;

Decorator with the getters of the module.
